subject: northern vs. oneok:  oneok measurement settlement

emails.subject: RE: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.subject_base: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.body: I know this is trivial, but, I don't believe we can actually settle on a .5 MMBtu and enter a fractional volume into GVA or TAS. I would suggest using 8,625.

emails.subject: RE: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.subject_base: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.body: I'll call Dari and have her put the rounded number in. Thanks. Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.subject_base: Northern vs. Oneok:  Oneok measurement settlement
emails.body: Rick, Dari said she would make the letter 8,625. Thanks. Lynn
